The '''''Benevolent III''''' was the personal transport of [[Baroness/Legends|Baroness]] [[Omnino]] as of [[37 BBY/Legends|37 BBY]]. It was of the same type as the [[Palpatine's transport|shuttle]] used by [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] during the years prior to the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]].

{{Ship-stub}}
